---
title: "NEJM Case Record 教學講義"
subtitle: "NEJM Case 7-2026"
author: "謝慕揚 MD, PhD, FESC"
date: 2026-03-26
lang: zh-TW
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
Case 7-2026: A 91-Year-Old Man with Left
Knee Pain
病例7-2026：一位91 歲男性，主訴左膝疼痛
N Engl J Med 2026;394:907-16
DOI: 10.1056/NEJMcpc2513545
February 26, 2026
1 病例呈現(Case Presentation)
1.1 Chief Complaint 主訴
A 91-year-old man was evaluated in the orthopedic surgery clinic of this hospital because of
left knee pain. 一位91 歲男性因左膝疼痛至Massachusetts General Hospital 骨科門診就診。 1.2 History of Present Illness 現病史
Key Timeline 關鍵時間線：
• 20 years before presentation: Left total knee arthroplasty (TKA); no subsequent
knee pain until current episode. 就診前20 年：左膝全人工膝關節置換術（TKA）；此後無膝痛直到本次發作。 • 5 years before presentation: Intravesical bacille Calmette–Guérin (BCG) for
bladder carcinoma. Sepsis requiring ICU admission after the 10th cycle of BCG. 就診前5 年：因膀胱癌接受膀胱內BCG 治療。第10 次BCG 治療後發生敗血症
需入ICU。 • 1 year before presentation: Superficial swab of a venous stasis ulcer on the left
leg grew methicillin-susceptible S. aureus; treated with 14-day cephalexin. 就診前1 年：左腿靜脈鬱滯性潰瘍表面拭子培養出MSSA；予14 天cephalexin 治
療。 • 7 months before presentation: Completed 3-month Unna boot therapy for a
distal left leg ulcer. 就診前7 個月：完成左小腿遠端潰瘍的3 個月Unna boot 治療。 • 6 months before presentation: Left knee pain developed; pain at rest, wors-
ened with weight-bearing. Progressive instability; began using rolling walker and
wheelchair. 就診前6 個月：左膝疼痛出現；靜態痛、負重時加劇。漸進性不穩；開始使用助行
器及輪椅。 • 3 weeks before presentation: Evaluation at another hospital. Moderate effusion;
radiograph showed cortical erosions, osteolysis, osseous fragmentation at lateral dis-
tal femoral metadiaphysis. α-defensin positive; bacterial cultures no growth after 2
and 14 days.


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
就診前3 週：於他院評估。中等量積液；X 光示外側股骨遠端幹骺端皮質侵蝕、骨
質溶解、骨碎片。α-defensin 陽性；細菌培養陰性。 • Day 0 (Current presentation): Referred to MGH orthopedic surgery clinic for
further evaluation. 就診當日：轉介至MGH 骨科門診進一步評估。 重點提醒
Clinical Pearl: α-Defensin 與人工關節周圍感染
α-Defensin 是活化的neutrophils 和macrophages 產生的antimicrobial peptide。Synovial
fluid α-defensin 陽性對PJI (periprosthetic joint infection，人工關節周圍感染) 的
診斷具有高度特異性，即使在培養陰性的情況下仍有診斷價值。但在adverse local tissue
reaction to metal、crystalline arthropathy 或inflammatory arthritis 時可能出現偽陽性。 1.3 Past Medical History 過去病史
Category
類別
Details
詳細內容
Past Medical
History
- Bladder carcinoma (treated with intravesical BCG, 5 years
prior)
- Left total knee arthroplasty (20 years prior)
- Venous stasis with stasis dermatitis and shallow ulcers
(MSSA colonization)
- Hypertension, dyslipidemia
- Coronary artery disease
- Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction
- Hypothyroidism
- Benign prostatic hyperplasia
- Sleep apnea (CPAP)
- Chronic right foot drop
- Provoked VTE (IVC filter placed due to GI bleeding on
anticoagulation)
- Gout (elevated uric acid at baseline)
Medications
- Amlodipine
- Carvedilol
- Empagliflozin
- Finasteride
- Levothyroxine
- Simvastatin
- Tamsulosin
- Torsemide
- Valsartan
續下頁...


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
Category
類別
Details
詳細內容
Social History
- Retired from sales; widowed; lives alone in independent
senior living community in Massachusetts
- Moved from Florida 5 years ago; no recent travel; no pets
- Occasional alcohol use
- Stopped smoking 43 years ago; no illicit drug use
Family History
Diabetes (mother); coronary artery disease (brother)
Allergies
ACE inhibitors (angioedema of tongue and lips)
1.4 Physical Examination 身體檢查
On examination:
• Blood pressure: 148/78 mm Hg
• Pulse: 71 beats per minute
• Respiratory rate: 20 breaths per minute
• Oxygen saturation: 90% on room air
• BMI: 36.4（肥胖）
• Left knee: Moderate effusion; tenderness at medial joint line; normal range of motion;
bruising at medial aspect (prior aspiration site)
• Legs: Pitting edema, diffusely dry skin, no skin breakdown or ulcers
• Chronic right foot drop
• Overall strength and sensation otherwise normal
1.5 Laboratory Data 實驗室數據
Test
檢驗項目
Result
結果
Reference
參考值
Clinical Significance
臨床意義
ESR
13 mm/hr
0–20
Normal 正常
CRP
15.9 mg/L
0.0–7.9
Elevated (inflammation)
升高（發炎）
Synovial Fluid Analysis（3 週前，他院）
Appearance
Bloody
—
Hemarthrosis
血性
Total nucleated-cell
count
6,190/µL
—
Elevated (suggestive of
PJI)
升高（提示PJI）
續下頁...


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
Test
檢驗項目
Result
結果
Reference
參考值
Clinical Significance
臨床意義
Differential
68%
neutrophils
—
Neutrophil-predominant
嗜中性球為主
α-Defensin immunoassay
Positive
Negative
Highly specific for PJI
對PJI 高度特異
Bacterial culture (2
days)
No growth
—
Negative（但不排除
PJI）
Bacterial culture (14
days)
No growth
—
Negative（但不排除
PJI）
Synovial Fluid Analysis（MGH 就診時）
Total nucleated-cell
count
5,657/µL
—
Elevated
升高
Differential
79%
neutrophils
—
Neutrophil-predominant
嗜中性球為主
Gram’s stain
Rare PMNs,
no organisms
—
No bacteria seen
未見細菌
Bacterial & fungal
culture
No growth
—
Negative 陰性
PJI Diagnostic Criteria 人工關節周圍感染的診斷標準
根據國際共識定義（meta-analysis by Sabater-Martos et al.）：
• Synovial fluid leukocyte count ≥3,000/µL：特異度≥95% for PJI
• Neutrophil percentage ≥75%：特異度≥95% for PJI
• 此病人兩次synovial fluid 均符合（6,190/µL, 68% neutrophils；5,657/µL, 79% neu-
trophils）
• α-Defensin positive 進一步支持PJI 診斷
1.6 Imaging Studies 影像學檢查
1.6.1 Radiograph of Left Knee 左膝X 光
• TKA components in place; no hardware complications
• Cortical erosions, osteolysis, and osseous fragmentation at lateral distal femoral metadi-
aphysis
• Joint effusion
1.6.2 CT of Left Knee（無顯影劑）
• Normal alignment of TKA components; no hardware complications
• Solid, masslike soft-tissue lesion (4.9 × 3.0 cm) at lateral distal femoral metadiaphysis


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
• Underlying cortical remodeling, erosion, and osteolysis
• Adjacent superficial, lobulated fluid collection
1.6.3 MRI of Left Knee（無顯影劑）
• Mass (6.0 cm greatest dimension) adjacent to lateral femoral condyle, involving lateral
joint space
• Intermediate-to-low signal intensity on STIR sequences
• Adjacent superficial, lobulated fluid collection extending into superolateral knee soft tissue
• Large joint effusion with extensive synovitis
• Baker’s cyst
• Heterogeneous red marrow in distal femur
2 醫學英文寫作解析(Medical English Writing Analysis)
Original Sentence
原文例句
Grammar
Structure
文法結構
Chinese
Translation
中文翻譯
Writing
Technique
寫作技巧
“The patient had been in
his usual state of
health...until 6 months
before the current
presentation, when left
knee pain developed.”
Past Perfect
with
“until...when”
病人維持平常健康狀
態... 直到就診前6 個
月，左膝疼痛出現。 使用過去完成式
建立發病前的健
康基準
Establishes
baseline before
symptom onset
“It is important to note
that this patient’s negative
synovial-fluid cultures
cannot rule out PJI.”
“It is important
to note
that...cannot
rule out”
需要注意的是，此病
人陰性的滑液培養不
能排除PJI。 以“It is
important to
note” 強調關鍵
臨床概念
Emphasizes a
critical clinical
caveat
“Negative cultures can be
explained by...the presence
of fastidious organisms that
do not grow readily in
conventional culture media;
by the residing of
organisms in periprosthetic
tissue or on the implant
surface...”
Parallel
“by...by...by...”
structure
培養陰性可由以下解
釋：... 苛養性微生物
不易在傳統培養基中
生長；微生物存在於
人工關節周圍組織或
植入物表面... 使用平行結構列
舉多重解釋
Parallel
structure for
multiple
explanations
續下頁...


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
Original Sentence
原文例句
Grammar
Structure
文法結構
Chinese
Translation
中文翻譯
Writing
Technique
寫作技巧
“Similar to M. tuberculosis,
BCG may establish latency. On reactivation, BCG
infection typically has a
subacute onset, which can
include the development of
inflammatory masses.”
“Similar to...” +
“On
reactivation”
與M. tuberculosis 類
似，BCG 可建立潛伏
狀態。再活化時，
BCG 感染通常以亞急
性起始，可包括發炎
性腫塊的形成。 以類比連結已知
概念，使用介詞
片語“On
reactivation” 標
示時間點
Analogy +
prepositional
phrase for
timing
“What constitutes infection
after BCG administration
is not clearly delineated,
but it may occur in up to
4% of patients.”
Noun clause as
subject + “is
not clearly
delineated”
BCG 給予後何種情況
構成感染尚未明確界
定，但可能發生在高
達4% 的病人中。 使用名詞子句開
頭，表達定義的
不確定性
Noun clause
conveys
definitional
ambiguity
“Although clues to the
identity of the pathogen
are not always present, the
patient history in this case
reveals two possible causes
of hematogenous infection.”
Concessive
clause
“Although...”
雖然病原體身分的線
索並非總是存在，但
此病人的病史揭示了
兩個可能的血行性感
染原因。 以讓步子句承認
限制，再聚焦關
鍵線索
Concessive
clause
acknowledges
limitation then
focuses
3 鑑別診斷(Differential Diagnosis)
重點提醒
Dr. Sandra B. Nelson 的診斷思路
面對此91 歲男性TKA 後20 年出現的左膝疼痛，聚焦三大核心特徵：
1. 漸進性發作，TKA 後多年（indolent onset, years after successful arthroplasty）
2. 鄰近關節的軟組織腫塊及液體集聚（masslike lesion and fluid collection contiguous
with joint）
3. 廣泛性滑膜炎及嗜中性球為主的滑液（extensive synovitis with neutrophil-
predominant leukocytosis）


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
Differential
Diagnosis
鑑別診斷
Supporting
Evidence
支持證據
Against
不支持證據
Suggested
Workup
建議檢查
Neoplasm
腫瘤
(Primary or
Metastatic)
- Presence of mass
- History of bladder
carcinoma
- Age
- Cannot fully explain
synovitis +
neutrophilic
leukocytosis
- No local invasion
reported for bladder
ca
- MRI signal not
typical for sarcoma
Biopsy
CT staging
Tenosynovial
Giant-Cell
Tumor
腱鞘巨細胞瘤
- Can be painful
- Hypervascular
synovial proliferation
- Primarily in
younger adults
- After arthroplasty:
exceptionally rare
- Not associated with
tumor-like masses
MRI with contrast
Biopsy
Hemarthrosis
關節血腫
- Bloody synovial
fluid
- Can cause
inflammatory
synovitis
- No trauma, no
anticoagulants, no
bleeding diathesis
Coagulation
studies
Inflammatory
Arthritis
發炎性關節炎
- Synovitis
- No preexisting
diagnosis
- No other joint
involvement
- Unusual in older
men
RF, anti-CCP
ESR, CRP
Crystalline
Arthropathy
結晶性關節病
- Synovial fluid
compatible
- Patient has elevated
uric acid
- Subacute onset and
chronic nature
- Juxtaarticular mass
atypical
- Very rare after TKA
(only 42 reported
cases)
Crystal analysis of
synovial fluid
Particle Disease
(Polyethylene
Wear)
微粒疾病
- 20-year-old implant
- Osteolysis
- Implant loosening
- Synovial fluid too
inflammatory
(polyethylene wear:
monocyte-
predominant)
- Juxtaarticular mass
atypical for
polyethylene wear
CT
Metal ion levels
續下頁...


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
Differential
Diagnosis
鑑別診斷
Supporting
Evidence
支持證據
Against
不支持證據
Suggested
Workup
建議檢查
Adverse Local
Tissue
Reaction to
Metal
金屬局部組織反應
- Masslike lesion
- Inflammatory
synovial fluid
- Would not occur in
TKA without
advanced
polyethylene wear
(metal components
do not directly
articulate)
Metal ion levels
Ultrasound
PJI with S. aureus
金黃色葡萄球菌
PJI
- MSSA colonization
of leg ulcer
- S. aureus: most
common cause of
hematogenous PJI
- S. aureus PJI is
typically acute and
early-onset
- Chronic, indolent
symptoms not typical
- No systemic illness
Blood cultures
Extended synovial
fluid culture
PJI with M. bovis
牛分枝桿菌BCG
PJI
- Intravesical BCG 5
years prior
- Sepsis after BCG
(possible
dissemination)
- Subacute/chronic
onset matches BCG
reactivation
- Inflammatory mass
formation
- Negative routine
bacterial cultures
(mycobacteria need
special media)
- Matches all core
features
Mycobacterial culture
(tissue + synovial
fluid)
PCR for M. tb
complex
Clinical Pearl 臨床要點：培養陰性的PJI——想到分枝桿菌
• PJI 的synovial fluid culture 敏感度僅65–78%——陰性培養不能排除PJI
• 培養陰性的原因包括：先前抗生素暴露、苛養性微生物、微生物存在於組織/植入
物表面而非滑液中、慢性感染中biofilm organism 繁殖率低
• 分枝桿菌無法在常規細菌培養基中生長，需要特殊的mycobacterial culture media
• 當面對培養陰性的PJI + indolent course + mass formation 時，需考慮mycobacterial
infection


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
4 討論(Discussion)
4.1 Periprosthetic Joint Infection (PJI) 人工關節周圍感染
PJI complicates 2–3% of arthroplasty procedures and may be acute or chronic, occurring at
any time after surgery. 人工關節周圍感染影響2–3% 的關節置換術，可為急性或慢性，在術後任何時間發生。 Mechanism
感染途徑
Features
特徵
This Patient
本病人
Direct inoculation
直接接種
During implantation
surgery
Usually early postoperative
Unlikely: 20 years since TKA
不太可能：術後已20 年
Contiguous spread
鄰近擴散
From adjacent
osteomyelitis
or soft-tissue infection
Possible (leg ulcer with
MSSA) but ulcer was at distal
leg, making spread unlikely
可能但潰瘍在小腿遠端
Hematogenous
spread
血行性播散
Organisms travel in
bloodstream and seed
periprosthetic joint
Can occur at any time
Most cases acute, some
indolent
Most likely mechanism
Antecedent BCG sepsis =
probable hematogenous
seeding
最可能的機制
4.2 BCG: From Vaccine to Cancer Therapy to Infection
• BCG (bacille Calmette–Guérin): Attenuated strain of Mycobacterium bovis, initially
developed as a vaccine against M. tuberculosis
• Recognized as an immunotherapeutic agent against cancer in the 1970s; now standard
care for bladder cancer without muscle invasion
• Mechanism: Intravesical BCG induces active mycobacterial replication within host tis-
sues →local immune response against cancer
• Infection after BCG: Occurs in up to 4% of patients
– Local genitourinary infection
– Disseminated disease（播散性疾病）
– Rare BCG sepsis（罕見BCG 敗血症）
• Similar to M. tuberculosis, BCG may establish latency（可建立潛伏感染）
• On reactivation: subacute onset, can include inflammatory masses（再活化時呈亞急
性，可形成發炎性腫塊）
• Osteoarticular complications: PJI typically occurs months to years after BCG admin-
istration


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
4.3 Diagnostic Testing 診斷檢查
Test
檢查
Result
結果
Significance
意義
Frozen section
（術中冷凍切片）
Chronic inflammation and
necrotic debris; no cancer
Ruled out malignancy
排除惡性腫瘤
Mycobacterial
culture
（分枝桿菌培養）
Growth in liquid medium
at 11+3 = 14 days
Confirmed mycobacterial PJI
確認分枝桿菌PJI
Ziehl–Neelsen
stain
（耐酸性染色）
Acid-fast bacilli confirmed
Confirmed mycobacteria
確認分枝桿菌
PCR + Sequencing
（分子檢測）
Positive for M. tuberculosis
complex
Confirmed TB complex 確認
結核複合體
MALDI-TOF MS
M. tuberculosis complex
Cannot discriminate species
within complex
無法區分複合體內各物種
Multiplex PCR
（多重PCR 鑑種）
Pan-M. tb complex
positive; all 4 targeted
regions absent
Confirmed M. bovis BCG
確認為M. bovis BCG
Drug susceptibility
（藥物敏感性）
Susceptible to isoniazid,
rifampicin, ethambutol
pncA H57D mutation →
pyrazinamide resistant
Intrinsic pyrazinamide
resistance = hallmark of M. bovis
固有pyrazinamide 抗性= M. bovis 特徵
重點提醒
Key Diagnostic Insight: M. bovis vs. M. tuberculosis
M. bovis（包括BCG 株）具有固有的pyrazinamide 抗性（pncA 基因突變）。這是區分
M. bovis 與M. tuberculosis 的重要特徵。治療時不可使用pyrazinamide。在分子層面上，
multiplex PCR 可透過鑑定M. tuberculosis complex 內特定基因區域的有無來區分物種。 5 最終診斷(Final Diagnosis)
Periprosthetic Joint Infection
with Mycobacterium bovis Bacille
Calmette–Guérin
人工關節周圍感染
病原體：牛分枝桿菌卡介苗株（BCG）
6 治療計畫(Treatment Plan)


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
6.1 Surgical Treatment 手術治療
One-Stage vs. Two-Stage Revision 一期vs. 二期翻修
選擇一期翻修（one-stage revision）的考量：
• 高齡（91 歲）、體弱、慢性足垂（chronic foot drop）→難以承受二期spacer 的負
重及活動限制
• 嚴重靜脈鬱滯→重複手術增加傷口癒合風險
• 疾病表現為indolent（亞急性），提示一期手術成功率較高
Procedure
手術項目
Details
詳細內容
Core needle biopsy
粗針切片
Ultrasound-guided sampling of lateral knee mass;
frozen section: chronic inflammation and necrotic
debris, no cancer
超音波導引穿刺；冷凍切片：慢性發炎及壞死碎片，
無癌症
Arthrotomy +
Débridement
關節切開+ 清創
Inflammatory tissue at lateral femoral condyle
extirpated (resulting in large bone defect);
aggressive synovectomy, débridement, and thorough
irrigation
切除外側股骨髁發炎組織（造成大骨缺損）；積極滑
膜切除及灌洗
Component revision
假體翻修
Femoral and tibial components visibly loose, readily
removed; cement mantles largely debonded. Reconstructed with long-stemmed, hinged implants;
cement impregnated with vancomycin and
gentamicin
股骨及脛骨組件鬆動移除；以長柄鉸鏈式植入物重
建；含vancomycin 及gentamicin 之抗生素骨泥
6.2 Pharmacological Treatment 藥物治療
Drug
(Generic
Name)
Dose
劑量
Route
途徑
Frequency
頻率
Indication/Mechanism
適應症/機轉
Empirical（術後經驗性治療）
續下頁...


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
Drug
(Generic
Name)
Dose
劑量
Route
途徑
Frequency
頻率
Indication/Mechanism
適應症/機轉
Vancomycin +
Ceftriaxone
Standard
IV
Per
protocol
Empirical coverage for
common PJI pathogens
(staphylococcus,
streptococcus,
enterococcus,
cutibacterium,
enterobacterales)
經驗性覆蓋常見PJI 病原
體
Definitive（確診後抗分枝桿菌治療）
Rifampin
Standard
PO
Daily
Bactericidal; penetrates
biofilm; significant drug
interactions (simvastatin,
valsartan, etc.)
殺菌性；穿透biofilm；藥
物交互作用多
Isoniazid
Standard
PO
Daily
Bactericidal against
actively growing
mycobacteria
對活躍生長的分枝桿菌具
殺菌性
Ethambutol
Standard
PO
Daily
Bacteriostatic; added to
triple-drug regimen. Discontinued due to
urticarial rash
抑菌性；因蕁麻疹停用
Pyridoxine (B6)
Standard
PO
Daily
Prevention of
isoniazid-induced
peripheral neuropathy
預防isoniazid 引起的周邊
神經病變
重點提醒
Critical Point 關鍵要點: M. bovis（包括BCG）具有固有pyrazinamide 抗性，因此治
療方案不包含pyrazinamide。此外，此病人基礎尿酸偏高，pyrazinamide 可誘發痛風發
作，是另一個避免使用的原因。Rifampin 與多種藥物有交互作用，需調整病人的長期用
藥。 6.3 Treatment Course and Outcome 治療經過及結果
• Treatment with rifampin, isoniazid, ethambutol, and pyridoxine started
• 3 weeks later: generalized rash →all antimycobacterial therapy discontinued; rash re-


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
solved
• Re-introduction one agent per week: isoniazid tolerated; ethambutol caused pruritic ur-
ticarial rash →permanently discontinued
• Patient expressed substantial distress about treatment toxicity and monitoring burden
• Once isolate confirmed as M. bovis BCG: offered isoniazid + rifampin alone →patient
declined further treatment
• 6 months after surgery: Healed well, no evidence of infection relapse or pain; continues
to live independently
• 6 個月後：傷口癒合良好，無感染復發或疼痛跡象；持續獨立生活
7 學習重點(Key Takeaways)
重點提醒
1. PJI Diagnosis: Culture-Negative Does Not Mean Infection-Free
• Synovial fluid culture sensitivity for PJI is only 65–78%
• Negative cultures may be due to fastidious organisms (e.g., mycobacteria), biofilm,
prior antibiotics, or organism location in tissue rather than fluid
• α-Defensin and synovial fluid cell count/differential are valuable adjuncts when cul-
tures are negative
• 培養陰性不等於無感染；α-defensin 和滑液細胞分析是培養陰性時的重要輔助診斷
工具
重點提醒
2. BCG Therapy Can Cause Late-Onset Osteoarticular Infection
• Intravesical BCG for bladder cancer can lead to active mycobacterial replication and
dissemination
• Similar to M. tuberculosis, BCG can establish latency and reactivate months to years
later
• Osteoarticular BCG infection, including PJI, is rare but well-documented
• A history of BCG therapy + sepsis should raise suspicion for mycobacterial PJI,
especially with indolent presentation
• BCG 治療後的敗血症病史應提高對分枝桿菌PJI 的懷疑


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
重點提醒
3. M. bovis Has Intrinsic Pyrazinamide Resistance
• M. bovis (including BCG) carries a characteristic pncA gene mutation (e.g., H57D)
• This confers intrinsic pyrazinamide resistance — pyrazinamide must NOT be included
in the regimen
• Species-level identification within the M. tuberculosis complex is essential for appro-
priate treatment
• M. bovis 具有固有pyrazinamide 抗性，治療方案不可包含pyrazinamide
重點提醒
4. One-Stage vs. Two-Stage Revision for PJI
• Two-stage revision is the traditional standard but requires prolonged immobilization
and repeat surgery
• One-stage revision may be appropriate for: elderly/frail patients, indolent infections,
patients with poor soft-tissue healing potential
• Decision should balance infection control with patient-centered factors (functional
status, comorbidities, quality of life)
• 一期翻修適用於高齡體弱、亞急性感染、軟組織癒合能力差的病人
重點提醒
5. Patient-Centered Care in Complex Infectious Disease Management
• This patient ultimately declined antimycobacterial therapy due to side effects and
monitoring burden
• Despite declining treatment, he remained infection-free at 6 months post-surgery
• Extensive risk–benefit counseling and shared decision-making are essential
• Antimicrobial stewardship must balance infection control with patient autonomy and
quality of life
• 抗微生物治療需平衡感染控制與病人自主權及生活品質
8 自我測驗(Self-Assessment Quiz)
8.1 題目(Questions)
Question 1. A 91-year-old man with a 20-year-old total knee arthroplasty presents with 6
months of progressive knee pain. Synovial fluid shows 6,190 nucleated cells/µL with 68% neu-
trophils, positive α-defensin, and negative bacterial cultures. Which diagnosis is most consistent


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
with these findings?
一位91 歲男性，20 年前接受全膝關節置換術，出現6 個月漸進性膝痛。滑液分析：核細
胞6,190/µL，68% 嗜中性球，α-defensin 陽性，細菌培養陰性。下列何者最符合？
(A) Polyethylene wear particle disease
(B) Crystalline arthropathy
(C) Periprosthetic joint infection
(D) Tenosynovial giant-cell tumor
(E) Implant malpositioning
Question 2. Which of the following best explains why routine bacterial cultures may be
negative in periprosthetic joint infection?
下列何者最能解釋為何常規細菌培養在人工關節周圍感染時可能為陰性？
(A) The infection has resolved spontaneously
(B) The organism may be fastidious, reside in biofilm on the implant surface, or require
specialized culture media
(C) Negative cultures definitively rule out infection
(D) The synovial fluid volume was insuﬀicient
(E) The culture incubation period was too long
Question 3. According to the international consensus criteria, which synovial fluid finding
has at least 95% specificity for periprosthetic joint infection?
根據國際共識標準，下列哪項滑液發現對PJI 的特異度至少95%？
(A) Leukocyte count ≥1,000/µL
(B) Leukocyte count ≥3,000/µL or neutrophil percentage ≥75%
(C) Monocyte percentage ≥50%
(D) Positive Gram’s stain
(E) Erythrocyte count ≥10,000/µL
Question 4. This patient received intravesical BCG for bladder cancer 5 years earlier. BCG is an attenuated strain of which organism?
此病人5 年前因膀胱癌接受膀胱內BCG 治療。BCG 是哪種微生物的減毒株？
(A) Mycobacterium tuberculosis
(B) Mycobacterium bovis


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
(C) Mycobacterium avium
(D) Mycobacterium kansasii
(E) Mycobacterium leprae
Question 5. Which of the following is a characteristic feature of Mycobacterium bovis that
distinguishes it from Mycobacterium tuberculosis?
下列何者是區分M. bovis 與M. tuberculosis 的特徵？
(A) Intrinsic isoniazid resistance
(B) Intrinsic rifampicin resistance
(C) Intrinsic pyrazinamide resistance
(D) Intrinsic ethambutol resistance
(E) Intrinsic fluoroquinolone resistance
Question 6. What is the most likely mechanism of periprosthetic joint infection in this
patient?
此病人人工關節周圍感染最可能的機制為何？
(A) Direct inoculation during the original arthroplasty 20 years ago
(B) Contiguous spread from the distal leg venous ulcer
(C) Hematogenous seeding from BCG-related bacteremia/sepsis
(D) Airborne transmission from an infected contact
(E) Reactivation of latent tuberculosis in the lung
Question 7. Which molecular diagnostic method was used to confirm the isolate as M. bovis BCG rather than another member of the M. tuberculosis complex?
使用何種分子診斷方法確認分離株為M. bovis BCG 而非M. tuberculosis complex 的其他
成員？
(A) MALDI-TOF mass spectrometry
(B) Standard PCR for M. tuberculosis
(C) Multiplex PCR targeting four genomic regions that vary among species within the M. tuberculosis complex
(D) 16S rRNA gene sequencing
(E) Whole-genome sequencing


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
Question 8. The surgeon chose a one-stage revision rather than a two-stage approach. Which of the following was NOT a reason for this decision?
外科醫師選擇一期翻修而非二期。下列何者不是此決定的原因？
(A) The patient was elderly and frail with chronic foot drop
(B) Profound venous stasis would impair soft-tissue healing with repeat operations
(C) The indolent nature of the infection suggested one-stage success was likely
(D) The pathogen was identified as M. bovis BCG preoperatively
(E) The patient would have struggled with weight-bearing limitations imposed by spacer
placement
Question 9. Why was pyrazinamide excluded from this patient’s antimycobacterial regi-
men?
為何此病人的抗分枝桿菌治療方案排除pyrazinamide？
(A) The patient was allergic to pyrazinamide
(B) M. bovis has intrinsic pyrazinamide resistance, and the patient had elevated baseline uric
acid
(C) Pyrazinamide is not effective against any mycobacteria
(D) Pyrazinamide interacts with rifampin
(E) The isolate had acquired pyrazinamide resistance
Question 10. At 6-month follow-up, the patient had healed well with no infection re-
lapse despite declining antimycobacterial therapy. Which factor most likely contributed to this
favorable outcome?
6 個月追蹤時，病人癒合良好且無感染復發，儘管他拒絕了抗分枝桿菌治療。哪個因素最
可能促成此良好結果？
(A) The infection was viral, not bacterial
(B) Aggressive surgical débridement with one-stage revision and antibiotic-impregnated ce-
ment provided suﬀicient local infection control
(C) The BCG organism spontaneously lost virulence
(D) The patient’s immune system was suppressed by medications
(E) The infection had spread to other joints


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
8.2 答案與解析(Answers and Explanations)
Question 1. Answer: (C)
Explanation: The combination of elevated synovial fluid nucleated-cell count (≥3,000/µL),
neutrophil predominance (≥75% on second aspiration), and positive α-defensin is highly spe-
cific for periprosthetic joint infection. Negative bacterial cultures do not rule out PJI, as the
sensitivity of synovial fluid culture is only 65–78%. 解析：滑液核細胞數升高（≥3,000/µL）、嗜中性球為主（第二次穿刺79%）及α-defensin
陽性的組合對PJI 高度特異。培養陰性不排除PJI。 Question 2. Answer: (B)
Explanation: Negative cultures in PJI can be explained by fastidious organisms (e.g.,
mycobacteria requiring special media), biofilm organisms on the implant surface with reduced
replication rates, organisms residing in periprosthetic tissue rather than shedding into fluid, or
prior antibiotic exposure. Negative cultures do NOT rule out infection. 解析：培養陰性可因苛養性微生物（如需特殊培養基的分枝桿菌）、植入物表面biofilm、
微生物存在於組織而非滑液中、或先前抗生素暴露。培養陰性不能排除感染。 Question 3. Answer: (B)
Explanation: A meta-analysis by the international consensus working group on PJI defi-
nition found that a synovial fluid leukocyte count ≥3,000/µL or neutrophil percentage ≥75%
has at least 95% specificity for PJI. These thresholds are widely used diagnostic criteria. 解析：國際共識工作小組的meta-analysis 發現滑液白血球≥3,000/µL 或嗜中性球比例
≥75% 對PJI 的特異度至少95%。 Question 4. Answer: (B)
Explanation: BCG (bacille Calmette–Guérin) is an attenuated strain of Mycobacterium
bovis, a bovine tuberculosis species closely related to M. tuberculosis. It was developed as a
vaccine against TB and is now also used as intravesical immunotherapy for non-muscle-invasive
bladder cancer. 解析：BCG 是Mycobacterium bovis（牛分枝桿菌）的減毒株，與M. tuberculosis 密切相
關。最初開發為TB 疫苗，現也用於非肌肉侵犯性膀胱癌的膀胱內免疫治療。 Question 5. Answer: (C)
Explanation: M. bovis (including the BCG strain) has intrinsic pyrazinamide resistance
due to a characteristic mutation in the pncA gene (e.g., H57D). This is a key distinguishing
feature from M. tuberculosis and has direct treatment implications — pyrazinamide must be
excluded from the regimen. 解析：M. bovis 因pncA 基因特徵性突變（如H57D）而具有固有pyrazinamide 抗性。這
是與M. tuberculosis 的關鍵區別，直接影響治療方案。 Question 6. Answer: (C)
Explanation: Direct inoculation is unlikely given the 20-year interval since arthroplasty. Contiguous spread is unlikely because the ulcer was at the distal leg, distant from the knee. The most likely mechanism is hematogenous seeding from BCG-related sepsis that occurred
after the 10th cycle of intravesical BCG therapy, with subsequent latency and reactivation in
the periprosthetic joint. 解析：距TKA 已20 年排除直接接種；潰瘍在小腿遠端排除鄰近擴散。最可能是第10 次
BCG 治療後的敗血症導致血行性播種，隨後在人工關節周圍潛伏並再活化。


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Periprosthetic Joint Infection with M. bovis BCG
Question 7. Answer: (C)
Explanation: A nucleic acid test designed for species discrimination was used, which
amplifies four genomic regions whose presence varies among species within the M. tuberculosis
complex. A pan-complex sequence was positive while all four targeted regions were absent,
confirming the isolate as M. bovis BCG. MALDI-TOF identified the complex but could not
discriminate species within it. 解析：使用擴增四個基因區域的multiplex PCR 進行物種鑑別。Pan-complex 序列陽性而
四個目標區域均缺失，確認為M. bovis BCG。MALDI-TOF 僅能識別complex 層級，無法區
分物種。 Question 8. Answer: (D)
Explanation: The pathogen was NOT identified preoperatively — it was identified only
after intraoperative tissue cultures grew mycobacteria. The reasons for choosing one-stage
revision were: (1) the patient was elderly and frail with foot drop; (2) profound venous stasis
would impair healing with repeat surgery; and (3) the indolent presentation suggested one-stage
success was likely. 解析：病原體並非術前鑑定的——而是術中組織培養後才確認。選擇一期翻修的原因是：
病人高齡體弱、嚴重靜脈鬱滯影響癒合、及亞急性病程提示一期手術成功率高。 Question 9. Answer: (B)
Explanation: M. bovis has intrinsic pyrazinamide resistance due to a pncA gene mutation,
making the drug ineffective. Additionally, this patient had an elevated uric acid level at baseline,
and pyrazinamide commonly causes gout flares by increasing uric acid levels — another reason
to avoid it. 解析：M. bovis 因pncA 基因突變具有固有pyrazinamide 抗性，使該藥無效。此外，病人
基礎尿酸偏高，pyrazinamide 常因增加尿酸水平而誘發痛風，是另一個避免使用的原因。 Question 10. Answer: (B)
Explanation: The favorable 6-month outcome despite the patient’s declining systemic
antimycobacterial therapy is most likely attributable to aggressive surgical débridement with
one-stage revision and the use of antibiotic-impregnated cement (vancomycin and gentamicin),
which provided suﬀicient local infection control. The indolent nature of BCG infection and the
thoroughness of the surgical débridement contributed to infection eradication. 解析：儘管病人拒絕全身性抗分枝桿菌治療，6 個月良好結果最可能歸因於積極手術清創、
一期翻修及含抗生素骨泥提供足夠的局部感染控制。BCG 感染的亞急性特質及徹底的手術
清創促成感染根除。 本講義整理自NEJM Case Records of the Massachusetts General Hospital
Case 7-2026, N Engl J Med 2026;394:907-16
編輯：謝慕揚Mu-Yang Hsieh, MD, PhD, FESC
僅供教學使用，請勿用於商業用途
